case_title: RAYMOND S. BROWN VS. LAWRENCE ACKER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BROWN, RAYMOND S. AS TO DEFENDANT ACKER, LAWRENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, RAYMOND S. AS TO DEFENDANT ACKER, LAWRENCE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-14-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PER MEDIATION AGREEMENT, PARTIES TO CONTINUE CASE EVERY THREE MONTHS UNTIL NOVEMBER 20, 2012. IF NO APPEARANCE ON THE LATTER DATE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ACKER, LAWRENCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-13-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-12-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSON FILED BY BROWN, RAYMOND S.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSON. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSON. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, RAYMOND S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACKER, LAWRENCE $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
